description: Low-risk market trading focused on lower taxes, lower broker fees, and more manual order flexibility.
recommended_for: Solo Alpha or Omega pilots who want repeatable station trading in Jita.

required_skills.name: Trade
required_skills.reason: Increases active market orders so you can test more small trades.
required_skills.economic_impact: More simultaneous orders and less missed opportunity.

required_skills.name: Accounting
required_skills.reason: Reduces sales tax on every completed sell order.
required_skills.economic_impact: Permanent profit improvement on every sale.

required_skills.name: Broker Relations
required_skills.reason: Reduces broker fees when placing market orders.
required_skills.economic_impact: Improves margins before every trade starts.

required_skills.name: Retail
required_skills.reason: Adds more market order slots after basic Trade.
required_skills.economic_impact: Lets you spread risk across more items.

required_skills.name: Marketing
required_skills.reason: Lets you sell items remotely within range.
required_skills.economic_impact: Saves travel time when managing orders.

optional_skills.name: Daytrading
optional_skills.economic_impact: Less travel to keep orders competitive.

optional_skills.name: Procurement
optional_skills.reason: Lets you place remote buy orders.
optional_skills.economic_impact: Useful after you understand regional trading.

omega_only_skills.name: Wholesale
omega_only_skills.reason: Large increase to market order slots for serious traders.
omega_only_skills.economic_impact: Scales trading capacity after Alpha basics.

warnings: Do not train expensive ship specializations before market fee skills if trading is your main goal.
Alpha characters can trade effectively, but high-volume trading scales better with Omega market order skills.
